home.title: Dao-Yu-101
home.subtitle: Explore the Archipelagos of Knowledge
home.about: Dao-Yu-101 is a modern learning platform that transforms education into an adventure. Navigate through archipelagos of knowledge, discover islands of wisdom, and unlock lessons that expand your horizons.

island.locked: This island is locked. Enter the password to access lessons.

about.title: About Dao-Yu-101
about.description: Dao-Yu-101 is an innovative learning platform designed to make education engaging and accessible. Our archipelago-based structure allows learners to explore knowledge in a non-linear, discovery-driven way.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize education by creating an immersive learning experience that adapts to each learner's journey.

shop.title: Shop
shop.description: Our shop is under construction. Soon you'll be able to purchase learning materials, Minecraft worlds, and exclusive content.
